{{Infobox location
| name = The Grave
| introduced = Waybound
}}

''See also: [[The Grave Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Grave]] is a massive, industrial-looking space station located in orbit above the central world of [[Sanctum]]. Originally constructed as an outpost for early [[Abidan]], the station was assembled from various outdated components and debris, including wrecked ships, asteroids, and destroyed buildings. It is situated on the moon of a dead planet and appears as an uneven, miles-long slab of metal that is large enough to potentially house several cities. Historically, the station was known as the [[Valiant Memorial Watchtower]] and functioned as a museum for generations of [[Abidan]]. It is also noted that the station was built following an ancient war and suffered a failure that resulted in the death of everyone on board. Internally, the station features various facilities such as docking bays, gray hallways, and a briefing room designed similarly to a cloudship's bridge. While the station is ancient, it has undergone recent upgrades and remodeling efforts by [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]]. The environment of the [[Grave]] is known to make spiritual perception difficult for those within it.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Constructed from a collection of outdated components, The [[Grave]] is a floating artificial mountain composed of stone and metal. This massive hovering station was originally cobbled together to serve as a protector for an outpost of early [[Abidan]]. While its external surface is rough and uneven, the structure is large enough to potentially house several cities. Inside, the station consists of gray hallways and possesses a nature that makes perception difficult for those within it.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] is a floating artificial mountain in space made of metal and stone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] was cobbled together from outdated pieces to protect an outpost of early [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] is a location that makes perception difficult due to the nature of the place.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] is large enough to potentially hold several cities.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] is a hovering station with a rough and uneven external surface.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Grave]] consists of gray hallways.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Grave]] is a mass of [[steel]] and stone hanging in orbit above the central world of [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Grave]] contains a briefing-room that resembles a cloudship's bridge.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Grave]] contains a briefing room with wide, sweeping monitors.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Grave]] is a station named by [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“You’ll get better at adapting your spiritual sense over time, but the Grave makes perception hard for anyone.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Grave was a mass of steel and stone hanging in orbit above the central world of Sanctum, and it was built with an aesthetic that she could charitably call “industrial.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
